abstract: Post-implementation lookahead skill for AI coding agents. After any code change, Foresight produces a compact structured block (max 120 words) surfacing imminent breakage, edge cases, security issues, broken patterns, and a prediction of the user's next prompt — before the user discovers the problem themselves. Benchmarked across 60 test cases (5 strata, 3 difficulty levels): 100% ground truth hit rate vs. 32% baseline, with a net token saving of +42 words per case by eliminating follow-up round-trips.
